creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not sure how to test this.
I do know the "post-install" target can be removed.

How much risk am I taking if I simple replace the old port with this one?  It passes stage checks? (e.g. make check-plist and make stage-qa) ?

Does it still apply at this very moment?

If you say "no risk" and "yes it does" then I'll probably commit it without testing further.


And oh, how usable is the current version of the port right now?
